title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
